series_metadata.series_title: Test Materials, Examinations, and Evaluation Tools
series_metadata.series_description: Test materials, examinations, and evaluation tools used in an examination for licensure that the Board develops or contracts with a private or government entity to administer as defined by R.C. 4713.24, unless the release of the record is otherwise prohibited by state or federal law, or the record is deemed to be the proprietary information of a private entity.
